# graphql/GetAdminAddons

## Overview

Get all addon packages for admin management. Returns array of AddonPackage with id, name, credits, ratePerCredit, and price. SuperAdmin only. Tries to get addons from database first, falls back to hardcoded ADDON_PACKAGES if database fails.
